name: swc-macro-wasm-example
description: Example usage of SWC Macro WASM bindings

scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:js
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm install && cargo test --workspace && pnpm -r test
scripts.test:watch: pnpm run test:watch:root & pnpm run test:watch:workspaces
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run test:coverage:rust && pnpm run test:coverage:js
scripts.test:coverage:js: pnpm run test:coverage:root && pnpm run test:coverage:workspaces
scripts.optimize:examples: pnpm -C examples/module-federation-example optimize && pnpm -C examples/module-federation-web-example optimize
scripts.examples:build-rsbuild: pnpm -C examples/rsbuild-project install --prefer-frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm -C examples/rsbuild-project build
scripts.build-and-test: pnpm run build && pnpm run examples:build-rsbuild && pnpm run optimize:examples && pnpm run test
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:rust && pnpm run lint:js
scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:rust && pnpm run clean:js && pnpm run clean:coverage
